title: Setup Monday for a nonprofit to organize fundraising
excerpt: Looking for someone to help setup Monday.com for a nonprofit specifically for organizing and tracking new and existing donors, pledges, collection of pledges and scheduling and keeping track of meetings with donors.

posts.author: Mayer (Mayer Plonka)
posts.cookedHtml: Looking for someone to help setup Monday.com for a nonprofit specifically for organizing and tracking new and existing donors, pledges, collection of pledges and scheduling and keeping track of meetings with donors.

posts.author: TeamEasy (Easy Mondays)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Mayer

Welcome to the community - Sounds like a job for Easy Mondays. Drop us an email and we’ll set up a time we can talk about your requirements and what you need from a working relationship.

Managing donors/pledges can be intricate to set up depending on the complexities, our team will assist you to map your requirements and ensure we can achieve your desired outcome.

teameasy@easy-mondays.com
Easy Mondays
